sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 12.70 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.12)

statement.latex: Let$p$be a prime number,$F$a free pro-$p 0.1ex$-group of finite rank, and$1$an automorphism of$F$whose order is a power of$p$. Is the rank of${ Fix}_F( )=\{ x F (x)=x\}$finite? If the order of$$is prime to$p$, then${ Fix}_F( )$has infinite rank (W.\,Herfort, L.\,Ribes, Proc. Amer. Math. Soc., { 108} (1990), 287--295). { L.\,Ribes} Yes, it is finite (C.\,Scheiderer, Proc. Amer. Math. Soc., { 127}, ...
